images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with the aesthetic of a top-tier gravure idol, posing playfully in an art gallery. She is dressed in a trendy, form-fitting sports bra and sleek yoga pants that accentuate her fit, curvy silhouette and slim waist, with fabric textures rendered in exquisite detail including the soft elasticity of the activewear. From an over-the-shoulder shot angle, she glances back with a playful, seductive wink and a captivating smile, wearing large over-ear headphones around her neck. The background features high-end abstract paintings bathed in cool blue city tones, creating a chic and fashionable atmosphere illuminated by a bright, clear, refrigerator-light glow that highlights her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and straight black silky hair. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, sharp focus, bokeh.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
